title: Spicy Indian Lamb Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy lamb stir fry dish inspired by Indian cuisine. Serve with rice or naan bread.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and cook the onion, bell pepper, and ginger until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, garam masala, cumin, and coriander, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato and cook until the sauce thickens, about 5 minutes.
Add the lamb back into the skillet and stir in the spicy sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with rice or naan bread.
Optional: Add some heat to the dish by sprinkling some red pepper flakes on top.
